integrity_evidence.verification_method: The original run captured final WebSocket and Worker sequence values plus Worker telemetry; the committed probe was subsequently hardened to make sequence gaps, Worker transport drops, Worker-reported backend drops, and backend batch/item/byte deltas part of its PASS predicate.

cleanup_evidence.original_run: not captured by the original probe
cleanup_evidence.follow_up: The stale RTT session was explicitly stopped and the target fixture dearmed before later release gates.
cleanup_evidence.current_probe: The committed probe now stops RTT, applies and reads back MKLINK_TARGET_DEARM_WRITES, waits for zero clients, and verifies release of user:dashboard:rtt in finally.

visibility.conclusion: The automation could not establish document.hidden=true, so this is not hidden-tab evidence. RenderScheduler hidden behavior remains covered only by the automated fake-document gate.
